title: Release Gate P1 - Production Env Activation

transitions.note: Production Team Mode activation is tracked separately from PR30. Code and local checks are green, but production still requires Upstash Redis env (UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_* or Vercel Marketplace KV_REST_API_* aliases), ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, redeploy, and smoke verification.
Current blocker: production /api/team-run can return 503 if the backend ENABLE_TEAM_MODE flag is not enabled while UI is exposed.

Vercel env name audit still does not show UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL/UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN or Vercel Marketplace KV_REST_API_URL/KV_REST_API_TOKEN aliases, ENABLE_TEAM_MODE, or NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE. Production /api/team-run remains blocked by SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE until those values are supplied and redeployed.

Repo now supports Vercel Marketplace KV_REST_API_URL/KV_REST_API_TOKEN aliases for Upstash-backed rate limiting, but live Vercel env ls still lacks UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_* or KV_REST_API_* plus ENABLE_TEAM_MODE and NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE. Production /api/team-run still returns 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.

Production activation completed: Upstash Marketplace KV aliases and both Team Mode flags are present in Vercel Production; deployment dpl_3XiR5XcnrsWutgjfw6Tfd5z9rn3o is Ready and aliased to new-era-ai-platform.vercel.app; health/models smoke passed; /team renders active roles; unauthenticated /api/team-run returns 401 AUTH_REQUIRED instead of 503; authenticated /api/team-run returned 200 with 4 steps using allowlisted openai/gpt-oss-20b:free. Supabase migration grant_anonymous_sessions_service_role fixed live /api/guest 42501; /api/guest returned 201/200 and 429 under limit test; Team Mode app rate limit returned 400,400,400,429 before model calls; admin /api/admin/stats returned 200x60 then 429. A default model smoke attempt hit OpenRouter 429, so provider quota remains an operational watch item, not an activation blocker. Task remains verify until commitHash exists.
Implementation and production activation evidence committed as 7569b89f2218e9c709f389954e8a080c1daab286. Task schema closeout complete.

notes: Definition of Done evidence is complete for production activation: Vercel Production has Upstash/KV aliases, ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, and NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true; production redeploy is Ready and aliased; /api/health and /api/models smoke passed; /team renders active Team Mode UI; unauthenticated POST /api/team-run is blocked by auth instead of feature-flag 503; authenticated Team Mode run succeeded with 4 role steps on an allowlisted model; Upstash-backed rate limits were verified for Team Mode, admin routes, and /api/guest. Supabase service_role table grants for anonymous_sessions were fixed by migration 20260702211527_grant_anonymous_sessions_service_role.sql. Done in commit 7569b89f2218e9c709f389954e8a080c1daab286.
